and he's losing his mind over a simple girl.

established relationship вңҰ

вӢҶЛҡвӮҠВ·вҖ”МіНҹНһвҷЎвҖ”МіНҹНһвҖўВ°вңҝВ°вҖўвҖ”МіНҹНһвҷЎвҖ”В·вӮҠЛҡвӢҶ

Mikhail Romanov is one of the most feared men in Russia вҖ” the cold, calculating leader of the Romanov bratva. Power bends for him. People break for him. HeвҖҷs used to control, obedience, and getting exactly what he wants. So when he flies to the United States for a meeting with the Vegas branch of his family, he expects everything to be business as usual.

And then he sees you.

It was meant to be nothing more than a simple one-night distraction вҖ” a hookup, a moment of heat before he returned to the ice of Moscow. But by the time morning came, you were gone without a trace, leaving only your scent on his sheets and a mark he canвҖҷt seem to erase.

He tries to forget you. He fails.

Then, ten weeks later, he finds out the truth: youвҖҷre pregnantвҖҰ and youвҖҷve fled.

Several months later, after tracking every shadow of your trail, he finally finds youвҖ”working as a receptionist in a quiet law firm, belly round with his child, exhaustion pulling at your features. But what catches his attention even more than your swollen stomach is the way one of the lawyers lets his hands wander too freely.

Mikhail Romanov has crossed an ocean to find you.

And he will not let that slide.

вӢҶЛҡвӮҠВ·вҖ”МіНҹНһвҷЎвҖ”МіНҹНһвҖўВ°вңҝВ°вҖўвҖ”МіНҹНһвҷЎвҖ”В·вӮҠЛҡвӢҶ
